quiz1.failureReason: Please tap the current location button

insight.title: How did you find the current location button?
insight.subtitle: Location icon is the universal symbol for 'here'
insight.locationDesc: The pin icon modeled after real map pins is a world standard symbol for current location in digital maps.
insight.compassDesc: Tapping the compass icon resets to north-up. A UI pattern that intuitively conveys orientation.
insight.zoomDesc: Two-finger pinch in/out is the standard gesture for smartphone map apps, used worldwide across languages.

quiz2.missionText: Please show the information of a registered school
quiz2.failureReason: Please tap the place with the school icon

insight.title: How did you recognize the school icon?
insight.subtitle: Icons communicate the type of place
insight.iconTitle: Icons indicate the type of facility
insight.iconDesc: In map apps, icons for schools, hospitals, and stations let you identify facility types at a glance — even without reading the language.
insight.tapDesc: Tapping a pin or icon displays the place details (name, address) in a bottom panel. The fundamental operation pattern of map apps.
insight.infoDesc: Saved places are always shown as icons on the map and tapping them instantly reveals details. Intuitive UI for bookmarked locations.

insight.title: How did you find the navigation button?
insight.subtitle: Arrow represents 'navigate'
insight.routeDesc: The upper-right arrow has become the standard navigation start button common to Google Maps and Apple Maps.
insight.transportDesc: Car, train, walk, bike icons in a row is a UI common across major map apps.
insight.stepDesc: Large turn-left/right instructions at the next intersection — turn-by-turn navigation continues from the car navigation era.

quiz4.missionText: Please add this place to favorites
quiz4.failureReason: Please add the place to favorites

insight.title: How did you find the favorites button?
insight.subtitle: Star mark is the universal symbol for favorites
insight.starTitle: Star mark is the international standard for favorites
insight.starDesc: Star (★) is unified as an icon meaning bookmark, favorites, and rating in maps, reviews, and SNS.
insight.savedDesc: Places added to favorites can be found in the Saved list. Basic pattern for content management UI.
insight.colorDesc: Star changing from gray to yellow visually communicates the state transition from unregistered to registered.
